column4: Now the LORD said unto {{c1::Abram}}: ‘Get thee out of thy country, and from thy kindred, and from thy father’s house, unto the land that I will show thee.
Now the LORD said unto Abram: ‘{{c1::Get}} thee out of thy country, and from thy kindred, and from thy father’s house, unto the land that I will show thee.
And {{c1::I}} will make of thee a great nation, and I will bless thee, and make thy name great; and be thou a blessing.
And I will make of thee a great {{c1::nation}}, and I will bless thee, and make thy name great; and be thou a blessing.
And {{c1::I}} will bless them that bless thee, and him that curseth thee will I curse; and in thee shall all the families of the earth be blessed.’
And I will bless them that bless thee, and him that {{c1::curseth}} thee will I curse; and in thee shall all the families of the earth be blessed.’
So {{c1::Abram}} went, as the LORD had spoken unto him; and Lot went with him; and Abram was seventy and five years old when he departed out of Haran.

And {{c1::Abram}} took Sarai his wife, and Lot his brother’s son, and all their substance that they had gathered, and the souls that they had gotten in Haran; and they went forth to go into the land of Canaan; and into the land of Canaan they came.
